data.title: GFL Environmental Inc. declares a quarterly dividend of US$0.0154 per share for their subordinate and multiple voting shares.
data.description: Today, GFL Environmental Inc. (NYSE: GFL) (TSX: GFL) based in Vaughan, ON, declared a cash dividend of US$0.0154 per outstanding subordinate voting share and multiple voting share. This announcement came from the Company's Board of Directors on October 2, 2025.

data.title: Brookdale Senior Living Inc. appoints Nick Stengle as CEO, known for driving operational excellence.
data.description: An accomplished executive with a successful track record in senior living, healthcare, and hospitality has been appointed in Nashville, Tennessee on October 2, 2025. Brookdale Senior Living Inc. (NYSE: BKD) is the company where this experienced individual will be leveraging their expertise. The company is focused on driving sustainable operational excellence.

Aerial footage showed the impact of record-breaking rainfall from Storm Gabrielle in Spain’s Ibiza. The heavy rains marked the island's rainiest day in over 70 years, according to Spanish weather agency AEMET. Spanish Guardia Civil rescued 148 people after Ibiza recorded 254 mm

data.title: Brookfield acquires majority stake in Angel Oak, adding residential mortgage credit capabilities; Brookfield's credit platform is valued at $332 billion.
data.description: In a joint announcement on October 2, 2025, Brookfield and Angel Oak Companies declared the finalization of their strategic alliance. Brookfield has purchased a controlling interest in Angel Oak, integrating residential mortgage credit expertise into Brookfield's extensive $332 billion credit portfolio. This collaboration aims to expedite Angel Oak's expansion within the sector while solidifying Brookfield's approach of integrating top-tier credit managers into its diverse investment offerings spanning infrastructure credit, real estate credit, asset-backed finance, and corporate credit.

data.title: Avery Dennison (NYSE: AVY) to host Q3 2025 earnings call on Oct 22 at 11:00 a.m. ET, with earnings released at 6:45 a.m. ET. Webcast available.
data.description: In Mentor, Ohio, Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE: AVY), a prominent global company specializing in materials science and digital identification solutions, has revealed it is set to conduct its third quarter earnings conference call on Wednesday, October 22, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET. The earnings release for the third quarter is expected to be published at around 6:45 a.m. ET that same morning. Those interested can tune into the live webcast of the event, with a replay accessible on Avery Dennison's Investor Relations website.

data.title: UK authorities consider giving fraud victims $6.4 billion from seized 61K Bitcoin, not original value.
data.description: Authorities in the United Kingdom are currently considering whether to retain around $6.4 billion in profits acquired from Bitcoin that was confiscated in connection to a significant fraud scheme originating from China. The funds in question were seized as part of the investigation into the case, and officials are deliberating whether to keep the sum rather than returning it to the victims who were affected by the scheme.

data.title: Sweden considers creating its own national Bitcoin reserve as proposed by two lawmakers, following global trend.
data.description: A proposal from two members of the Sweden Democrats aims to align the country's policies with those of nations such as the United States regarding Bitcoin reserves. This motion reflects the growing trend of countries considering holding Bitcoin assets.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer wins several awards for finance, risk, regulatory excellence. Awards from Risk Asia Awards 2025 and Global BankTech Awards 2025.
data.description: In Singapore, Wolters Kluwer Financial & Corporate Compliance has recently been awarded prestigious accolades, solidifying its position as a top provider of finance, risk, and regulatory reporting software solutions for global financial institutions. The company received recognition from leading industry awards programs - the Risk Asia Awards 2025 and The Digital Banker’s Global BankTech Awards 2025. This reaffirms Wolters Kluwer's leadership role in the sector. The company expressed gratitude for the honors received, emphasizing the importance of these achievements within the industry.

data.title: ExQor Technologies in Boston is moving towards clinical trials for brain regenerative medicine to treat Alzheimer's disease.
data.description: In Boston on October 2, 2025, ExQor Technologies, located in Boston, MA, is gearing up for clinical trials for its unique brain regenerative medicine platform designed to tackle Alzheimer's disease, a pressing medical issue. The company aims to address the critical unmet needs of patients suffering from Alzheimer's. This initiative comes as a significant step forward in the fight against the disease, affecting millions worldwide.

data.title: The Longest Table, supported by Nextdoor Foundation, expands across the U.S. to connect neighbors through meals.
data.description: In an initiative to tackle loneliness and foster stronger community bonds, The Longest Table expands its efforts in San Francisco. The program aims to bring more neighbors together through shared meals, emphasizing the importance of local connections.
